    "caption": "Planning a wedding? 💍 The biggest stress after the main event is finding a comfortable stay for your guests. We've got you covered!\n\nWelcome your friends and family to the luxury of Ave Vista Resorts. Our beautiful cottages and premium amenities are the perfect way to say \"Thank you\" for traveling to celebrate with you.\n\nGive your guests a mini-vacation with our:\n\n🏊 Swimming Pool\n\n🎉 Outdoor Party Area\n\n🌳 Tree House & Tent Stay\n\n...and so much more!\n\nStop stressing and start celebrating.       {
        "reviewerId": "117040951872798146379",
        "reviewerUrl": "https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117040951872798146379?hl=en",
        "name": "Delbin Joseph",
        "reviewerNumberOfReviews": 5,
        "isLocalGuide": false,
        "reviewerPhotoUrl": "https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIciAeEjsERH7FHhcbT2u1fgwMBJAQq68lpH8EvpQ3rgw23Sw=s1920-c-rp-mo-br100",
        "text": "Very good catering service. Very delicious dishes. Variety of dishes. Prompt services. Recommends always.",
        "textTranslated": null,
        "publishAt": "a year ago",
        "publishedAtDate": "2025-01-13T02:22:53.011Z",
        "likesCount": 0,
        "reviewId": "ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfNU5ETHJBRRAB",

      {
        "reviewerId": "113682507384513940907",
        "reviewerUrl": "https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113682507384513940907?hl=en",
        "name": "santhosh sebastian",
        "reviewerNumberOfReviews": 8,
        "isLocalGuide": false,
        "reviewerPhotoUrl": "https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJR7ImebQBKBfjHzi4L4Bbke_lobpEs5BdzPGgAzjq1Fc40zzn=s1920-c-rp-mo-br100",
        "text": "Outstanding Catering Experience!\n\n⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐\n\nI recently hired Mr.Chef’s services for my younger brother’s wedding, and I cannot say enough good things about them! From start to finish, the entire experience was seamless and enjoyable.\n\nThe team was incredibly professional and attentive during our initial consultation. They took the time to understand our vision and offered great suggestions that perfectly matched our theme and preferences. The menu they created was diverse and catered to all dietary needs, which was a huge plus for us.\n\nOn the day of the event, the catering staff arrived on time and set everything up beautifully. The presentation of the food was stunning, and it tasted even better! Our guests were raving about the appetizers, main courses, and desserts throughout the night. It was clear that a lot of care went into each dish.\n\nWhat impressed me most was the exceptional service provided by the staff. They were friendly, efficient, and always available to assist without being intrusive. They made sure everything ran smoothly, allowing us to fully enjoy the celebration without any worries.\n\nOverall, I highly recommend Mr. Chef and lt’s lead Mr.Manu for any event. Their professionalism, attention to detail, and delicious food exceeded our expectations. Thank you for making our special day even more memorable! We will definitely be using your services again in the future!",
        "textTranslated": null,
        "publishAt": "a year ago",
        "publishedAtDate": "2025-01-12T16:16:15.436Z",
        "likesCount": 0,
        "reviewId": "ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfMk0tNHFRRRAB",
        "reviewUrl": "https://www.google.com/maps/reviews/data=!4m8!14m7!1m6!2m5!1sChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfMk0tNHFRRRAB!2m1!1s0x0:0x2bc13df0aa0cff51!3m1!1s2@1:CIHM0ogKEICAgIC_2M-4qQE%7C%7C?hl=en",

        "text": "I am very happy with their intervention.\nThey made our beautiful moments even better, they are really outgoing, their food and the way they welcome people is commendable. May the works ahead be even more spectacular.\nall the best team Mr. Chef",
